══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist.
→ Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:6+3=9 vs DC 20] FAIL! 26 necrotic damage. HP: 33/59
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 33/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 33/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 15] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 128/135
══ ROUND 4 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 30 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist --- HP: 3/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Lizardfolk — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
